free_text: Spreadsheet-style attachment page (footer: "MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16"). Transposed grid: each COLUMN is one asset; selections indicated by solid black-filled cells. Blocks: Value of Asset; Type of Income; Amount of Income: Current Year; Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016. Bucket labels carry letter prefixes ("A:", "B:", ...) which are stripped in value/amount fields. EIF row blank for all columns. All three assets on this page: black fill on the None row of every block; no other cells filled. "Page ___ of ___" left blank.

uncertainties.note: printed name appears truncated by cell width; trailing 'I' is likely the start of 'Inc'. Transcribed as printed.
